allow: PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -match 'WSL|vEthernet' } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress, PrefixLength | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "---"; wsl --version 2>&1 | Out-String; "---"; "Testing direct TCP with timeout..."; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 172.30.195.69 -Port 6379 -InformationLevel Detailed -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Out-String\))
PowerShell($wslconfig = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.wslconfig"; if \(Test-Path $wslconfig\) { "Existing .wslconfig:"; Get-Content $wslconfig | Out-String } else { "No .wslconfig present" })

PowerShell("=== Windows netstat for port 6379 ==="; netstat -an | findstr :6379; "=== TCP via 127.0.0.1 ==="; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 6379 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded; "=== Hyper-V firewall settings ==="; Get-NetFirewallHyperVVMSetting -PolicyStore ActiveStore -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, DefaultInboundAction, DefaultOutboundAction, LoopbackEnabled | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force auth-server -Exclude target,.git | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "erika"; & "psql" -h localhost -p 15552 -U postgres -c "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname IN \('xerika','xerika-java'\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\winte\\Desktop\\xerika; foreach \($f in "auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\ClientRequest.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\ClientSummary.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\ConsentSummary.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\RoleSummary.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\SessionSummary.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\UserCreateRequest.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\UserSummary.java","auth-server-but-java\\src\\main\\java\\com\\xerika\\auth\\admin\\dto\\UserUpdateRequest.java"\) { Write-Output "=== $f ==="; Get-Content $f })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== /q/health ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/q/health" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output "`n=== /q/health/ready ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/q/health/ready" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output "`n=== /.well-known/openid-configuration ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/.well-known/openid-configuration" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object issuer, authorization_endpoint, token_endpoint, jwks_uri; Write-Output "`n=== /.well-known/jwks.json \(key count\) ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/.well-known/jwks.json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty keys | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.xerika\\auth\\keys" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)
Bash(echo "=== PWD ==="; pwd; echo "=== xerika ==="; ls "C:/Users/winte/Desktop/xerika" 2>&1 | head -50; echo "=== erika/erika ==="; ls "C:/Users/winte/Desktop/erika/erika" 2>&1 | head -50)
